codeReview.summary: Clean implementation of graceful error handling. Two components added to __root.tsx: NotFoundPage (404 page) registered as notFoundComponent, and ErrorPage (generic error boundary) registered as errorComponent. Both components use consistent styling with the app's design system (CSS custom properties like --sea-ink, --lagoon-deep), expose no internal error details or stack traces, and provide 'Go Home' navigation links. ErrorPage correctly delegates NotFound-type errors to the 404 page. 13 well-structured tests cover rendering, no-stack-trace guarantees, error message suppression, NotFound delegation, and accessibility. The worker verified the feature both via curl commands and agent-browser automation, confirming 404 page renders correctly and game page loads in 366ms (well under 3s requirement).

summary: The error-handling feature is well-implemented and fully covers the requirements. NotFoundPage and ErrorPage are properly registered on the root route using TanStack Router's notFoundComponent/errorComponent APIs. No stack traces or internal error details are ever exposed to users. The implementation is consistent with the project's styling patterns and was thoroughly verified via unit tests (13 tests), curl, and browser automation (366ms load time). No issues found.
